text:
In the first scene, I observe a group of people gathered around tables in a glass-walled room, deeply engaged in conversation or collaboration. I feel a sense of curiosity and slight distance, as if standing outside a shared experience yet invited to reflect on human connection and collective inquiry. 

In the second scene, I stand before an exhibit of innovation, reading about research and development. The colors and displays awaken a spirit of wonder in me. Here, my thoughts revolve around progress and the endless quest for understanding. I feel inspired—moved by the perennial human drive to explore, explain, and create together.
